Home/Creation Process

How the guide works

A routing layer for regional visibility.

Use this guide when you need to know which existing channel fits the job: getting listed, posting an event, asking about advertising, reaching visitors, finding partners, or verifying public information.

Mobile quick route

How this was built

The short version: the guide routes users to existing public pages, directories, calendars, and update paths.

DirectorySubmit updateSources

Purpose

What this guide does.

This guide does not replace chambers, tourism sites, newspapers, directories, calendars, or public offices. It helps people use those sources correctly, in a practical order, and with a clear next step.

Use it when someone has a business, event, nonprofit, gallery, class, service, or program and needs to know where to put it so people across Colfax, Las Animas, and Huerfano counties can find it.

Download CSV Download JSON Download Sources

Update model

Keep the guide useful by checking the details that change.

1

Open the page

Use the linked page, form, directory, or public contact route before spending time or money.

2

Confirm the current rule

Ask about rates, deadlines, acceptance, eligibility, and the preferred submission format when those details matter.

3

Submit changes

If a link, listing, office, or route has changed, send the correction with the source that should be checked.

4

Review before publication

New public claims and civic/legal guidance should be approved by a human reviewer before they go live.

Build a similar guide

How another community can map its own channels.

1

Name the user jobs

Write down what people actually need: get listed, post an event, find funding, ask for mentorship, reach visitors, update a directory, or find a partner.

2

Start with official directories

Collect city, county, chamber, tourism, creative-district, library, newspaper, nonprofit, and economic-development pages before making a new directory.

3

Add self-submission paths

Look for add-a-business, submit-an-event, update-a-resource, newsletter, visitor-guide, public-notice, and contact-us paths. Record what users can reasonably ask for.

4

Keep a review trail

Keep notes about where each route came from, but write the public page around what a user can do next.

5

Write action copy

Explain what the source is for, who should use it, what to prepare, and what must be verified first.

6

Keep updates open

Give users a correction path, a submission path, and a review date so the guide can keep improving.

Before relying on a listing

Verify the details that can change.

  • Confirm directory and submission links before sending people to them.
  • Verify business phone numbers, addresses, eligibility, and update processes before printing or promising anything.
  • Ask chambers, city offices, newspapers, creative districts, and economic-development organizations whether they want wording changed.
  • Do not assume free placement, ad availability, endorsement, deadlines, audience size, or acceptance unless the source confirms it.

Source index

Public directories and resource directorys used by the guide.

Search the rows in this section.

SourceCountyTypeBest for
Raton Chamber Business Directory Colfax Business directory Finding Raton-area businesses, sponsors, chamber contacts, and local service anchors.
City of Raton Local Business Support Colfax Business support Hands-on startup help, SBA, SBDC, GrowRaton, Raton MainStreet, SCORE, and city support paths.
GrowRaton Colfax Economic development Business planning, networking, training, market-entry contacts, cottage market activity, and expansion help.
Raton MainStreet Colfax Downtown / events Downtown events, storefront activity, volunteers, sponsors, and Main Street business visibility.
Explore Raton Colfax Tourism / events Visitor-facing eat, stay, shop, arts, events, and tourism context.
Explore Raton Events Colfax Event calendar Signature events, local happenings, seasonal activity, and tourism timing.
KRTN Enchanted Air Radio Colfax Media / advertising Radio advertising, community calendars, regional reach, and public announcements.
El Raton Media Works Local Businesses Colfax Local business list Raton business examples and media/arts adjacent anchors.
Raton Arts & Humanities Council Colfax Arts organization Old Pass Gallery, regional artists, arts programming, and cultural referrals.
Raton Arts and Cultural District Colfax Creative district Arts/culture district context, Shuler Theater, Old Pass Gallery, El Raton, and district story.
Groundworks New Mexico Nonprofit Directory Colfax Nonprofit directory Raton and Colfax nonprofit discovery, including arts, community improvement, and human services.
SHARE New Mexico Colfax Community resource directory New Mexico community resources, program locations, county pages, and grants/funding discovery.
NM Creative Industries Resource Center Colfax Creative economy directory Creative businesses, spaces, galleries, studios, theaters, resource directorys, and statewide opportunities.
NM Creative Industries Resource Submission / Update Regional Creative economy listing update Self-submitted or corrected creative-industry resources, including businesses, services, spaces, events, arts districts, programs, and organizations.
NM EDD Business Resource Map Regional Economic-development resource directory Finding and submitting New Mexico business-support resources, funding assistance, services, and regional economic-development contacts.
Colexico Alliance / TLAC Chamber Las Animas Regional chamber Member directory, community articles, event calendar, local products, and the cross-state regional chamber frame.
Visit Trinidad Resources for Locals Las Animas Tourism / event support Marketing support, event support, social media co-op, community calendar, business directory listing, and attraction listing requests.
City of Trinidad Economic Development Newsletter Las Animas Economic development updates Trinidad and Las Animas news, resources, and event updates from city economic development.
City of Trinidad Grants Las Animas Funding Grant notices for nonprofits and community-serving organizations.
CREATE Trinidad Las Animas Creative district Artists, entrepreneurs, Space to Create, creative projects, events, and rentals.
The Chronicle-News Las Animas Media / classifieds Trinidad/Las Animas and Raton/Colfax news categories, classifieds, jobs, obituaries, legal notices, and local features.
Southern Colorado Community Foundation Nonprofit Directory Las Animas Nonprofit directory Southern Colorado nonprofit search, grantseeker pathways, and volunteer profile discovery.
Colorado Gives Las Animas Nonprofit giving directory Colorado nonprofit discovery, fundraising profiles, and donor-facing visibility.
Huerfano County Chamber Huerfano Chamber / events Networking, education, promotion, advocacy, events, membership, and countywide business exposure.
Huerfano Chamber Resources Huerfano Resource directory Links to Huerfano County, La Veta, Walsenburg, Spanish Peaks Country, Huerfano Economic Development, and Wheelhouse.
Huerfano County Economic Development Support & Incentives Huerfano Economic development Rural Jump Start, HUBZone, enterprise zone, SBDC, SCEDD, Wheelhouse, workforce, tourism, and incentive context.
Spanish Peaks Country Business Directory Huerfano Business / tourism directory Dining, lodging, shopping, galleries, museums, services, and visitor-facing business discovery.
Town of La Veta Business Directory Huerfano Municipal business directory La Veta business names, addresses, phone numbers, and downtown/creative-economy anchors.
The World Journal Huerfano Media / submissions Stories, events, ads, classifieds, legal notices, subscriptions, and local deadline planning.
World Journal Services Directory Huerfano Services directory Electricians, plumbers, real estate agents, local service firms, and service referrals.
Huerfano County Government Calendar Huerfano Public calendar County meetings, public events, and government visibility timing.
Spanish Peaks Library Community Links Huerfano Community links Huerfano historical, library, local government, tourism, and community organization links.
La Veta Creative District Huerfano Creative district Creative spaces, festivals, workshops, art shows, performances, and artist resources.
Wheelhouse Retail Incubator & Makerspace Huerfano Incubator / makerspace Retail incubation, makerspace activity, pop-up retail, and early-stage local business support.
Bachman Community Calendar Huerfano Community calendar Farmers markets and recurring local event timing across La Veta, Cuchara, Gardner, and Walsenburg.
New Mexico Small Business Development Center Regional SBDC No-cost counseling and training for New Mexico entrepreneurs and small businesses.
Colorado SBDC Network Regional SBDC Colorado small-business advising, training, startup help, expansion help, and certifications.
SBA SBDC Finder Regional Federal business support Finding SBDC counseling and training by ZIP code.
Colorado Creative Industries Regional Creative economy support Colorado arts, creative industries, promotion, resources, and funding opportunities.
Colorado Nonprofit Association Directory Regional Nonprofit directory Colorado nonprofit member lookup and peer organization discovery.
Southern Colorado Economic Development District Regional Economic development district Southern Colorado planning, technical assistance, economic development, and regional strategy context.
USDA Rural Business Development Grants Regional Rural funding Rural business development planning, technical assistance, and small/emerging business expansion support.
Arts in Society Grant Regional Arts / civic grants Colorado artists, arts organizations, schools, governments, and cross-sector projects using art to address civic or social challenges.
Bar NI Community Fund Las Animas Local nonprofit grants Purgatoire Valley 501(c)(3) nonprofits and service organizations seeking project support in youth development, education, environment, health, human services, civic work, and public benefit.
Colorado Advanced Industries Accelerator Programs Regional Startup / innovation grants Colorado startups, researchers, and technology companies commercializing products in advanced industries.
Colorado Business Funding and Incentives Regional Business funding directory Colorado businesses comparing tax credits, grants, loans, rural incentives, and job-creation programs.
Colorado Community Revitalization Grant Regional Creative district / main street funding Creative districts, historic districts, main streets, and neighborhood commercial-center projects needing gap funding.
Colorado Creates Grant Regional Arts organization grants Colorado nonprofit arts organizations and public arts programs seeking annual competitive support for arts programs, services, and activities.
Colorado Rural Jump-Start Program Regional Startup incentive / rural grant New or relocating businesses considering eligible rural Colorado zones, including tax benefits and possible matching grants.
Folk and Traditional Arts Project Grant Regional Cultural heritage grants Colorado projects that celebrate, document, or preserve folk and traditional arts and cultural heritage.
Gates Family Foundation Capital Grants Regional Colorado nonprofit capital grants Colorado nonprofits and community organizations with capital projects such as buildings, renovation, land, parks, arts/culture spaces, or civic infrastructure.
Grants.gov Regional Federal grant search Federal grant searches for nonprofits, public agencies, educational institutions, and eligible organizations.
History Colorado State Historical Fund Regional Historic preservation grants Colorado historic preservation, archaeology, education, and planning projects tied to significant places or cultural resources.
National Endowment for the Arts Grants Regional Federal arts grants Arts nonprofits and eligible organizations seeking federal project support, including small-organization arts access opportunities.
New Mexico Arts Grants Colfax Arts organization grants New Mexico nonprofits and government entities supporting arts education, arts economic development, performing arts, visual arts, media arts, literary arts, and folk arts.
New Mexico Business Portal Financial Assistance Colfax Business funding directory New Mexico entrepreneurs comparing SBA funding programs, state finance options, and business assistance paths.
New Mexico Creative Industries Division Grants Colfax Creative business / organization grants New Mexico creative businesses, nonprofits, public agencies, and legal entities watching creative-industry grant and pre-application opportunities.
New Mexico Finance Authority Opportunity Enterprise Colfax Commercial development loans New Mexico commercial-building, renovation, and development projects that increase usable business space.
New Mexico Finance Authority SSBCI Colfax Small business capital access New Mexico small businesses seeking capital through lender partnerships, loan participation, or capital access programs.
New Mexico Job Training Incentive Program Colfax Workforce training reimbursement New Mexico expanding or relocating businesses creating new jobs and needing wage/training reimbursement support.
New Mexico Small Business Assistance Program Colfax Technical assistance / noncash support New Mexico for-profit small businesses needing technical help from Los Alamos or Sandia national laboratories.
SBA Funding Programs Regional Small business loans / capital Small businesses comparing SBA-backed loans, investment capital, disaster assistance, surety bonds, and lender matching.
SBA Lender Match Regional Small business lender matching Small businesses looking for SBA-approved lenders and competitive loan options.
Southern Colorado Community Foundation Grants Regional Nonprofit grants Eligible nonprofits serving southeastern Colorado counties, including Huerfano and Las Animas.
Southern Colorado Community Foundation Scholarship Regional Scholarship Eligible high-school girls golf team members in several southern Colorado counties, including Huerfano and Las Animas, seeking college or vocational support.
Trinidad Community Foundation Grant Process Las Animas Local nonprofit grants Colorado nonprofits, public entities, nonprofit schools, and fiscally sponsored charitable/civic/educational work tied to Trinidad grant processes.
USDA Rural Microentrepreneur Assistance Program Regional Rural microbusiness loans / grants Microenterprise development organizations that provide technical assistance and microloans to rural entrepreneurs and small businesses.
USDA Value-Added Producer Grants Regional Agriculture / producer grants Agricultural producers, producer groups, farmer/rancher cooperatives, and producer-owned businesses developing value-added products or markets.
WESST Lending Colfax Startup / small business loans New Mexico startups and existing small businesses seeking microloans, consulting, and training support.
City of Raton Business Services Colfax Municipal business resources Official Raton business services, permits, licenses, economic development, and support pages.
Explore Raton Shopping Colfax Visitor business directory Visitor-facing retail, handmade goods, local shops, and shopping-related Raton discovery.
GrowRaton Commercial Properties Colfax Property / expansion Businesses considering storefront, workspace, relocation, or expansion in Raton.
Colfax County Business Resources Colfax County business resources Bid opportunities, RFPs, county business pages, and public-sector entry points.
Colfax County Clerk Colfax County clerk / records Public records, election/county office routing, and official county verification.
City of Raton Business Licenses and Regulations Colfax Licensing / compliance Raton business registration, zoning checks, and local licensing steps.
RAIN Colfax Business Licenses Colfax Business license support Regional business-license pointers and Colfax community resource routing.
Tax Exempt World Colfax County Organizations Colfax Nonprofit aggregator Broad nonprofit discovery when official nonprofit directories are incomplete.
Enigma Directory: Raton Business Entities Colfax Business data aggregator Supplemental entity discovery, addresses, websites, and business patterns.
Yellow Pages Raton Business Listings Colfax Commercial directory Supplemental public business lookup where official directories miss categories.
Las Animas County Government Las Animas County government County offices, public services, official contact routing, and civic context.
Visit Trinidad Submit Your Event Las Animas Event submission Submitting visitor-relevant Trinidad and Las Animas County events for review.
Colorado OEDIT Rural Opportunity Office Regional Rural business development Rural Colorado business, community, and economic-development programs.
Bent County Business Development Las Animas Regional business development Southeast Colorado business-development contact paths that may support Las Animas-area users.
Huerfano County Government Huerfano County government County offices, public notices, events, affiliated agencies, and official Huerfano context.
Spanish Peaks Country Add Business Listing Huerfano Directory submission Visitor-facing businesses that may belong in the Spanish Peaks Country directory.
Spanish Peaks Country Submit Event Huerfano Event submission Submitting Huerfano-area events for the public tourism/event calendar.
NM Family Friendly Business Directory Regional Business recognition directory New Mexico businesses that want family-friendly workplace visibility and peer discovery.
New Mexico Business Portal Regional Business startup / licensing Business planning, registration, licenses, permits, and expansion information in New Mexico.
Finance New Mexico Regional Economic Development Organizations Regional Economic-development directory New Mexico regional economic-development organization lookup.
Angel Fire Chamber Member Business Directory Colfax Member business directory Angel Fire and Moreno Valley businesses, nonprofits, artists, lodging, dining, services, and chamber member categories.
Village of Eagle Nest Business Directory Colfax Municipal business directory Eagle Nest lodging, retail, galleries, outfitters, food, home services, and lake-corridor businesses.
Walsenburg Forms and License Applications Huerfano Municipal forms / vendor permits Business license, food vendor, peddler, solicitor, liquor, special-event, and local application paths.
Colexico Alliance / TLAC Chamber Regional Hub Regional Regional chamber / member network Cross-county chamber context, Las Animas business support, regional member discovery, and Colexico Alliance routing.
Spanish Peaks Country Add Business Listing Huerfano Tourism directory submission Huerfano visitor-facing businesses, galleries, venues, lodging, dining, shopping, and attractions seeking directory visibility.
Artists Sunday Artist Directory Regional Artist directory Artists and makers seeking a broader public artist directory, including existing La Veta-area examples.
City of Raton Economic Development Programs Colfax Startup / economic-development resource directory Raton and Colfax startup paths, SBA/SBDC/SCORE/FastTrac links, GrowRaton, Raton MainStreet, and related support routes.
Trinidad Community Foundation Las Animas Local foundation / grantmaker Las Animas County nonprofit and public-benefit projects seeking local foundation context or grantmaker contact information.
Spanish Peaks Community Foundation Huerfano Local foundation / community projects Huerfano County local projects, artists, tradition-keepers, small nonprofits, gathering spaces, and cultural stewardship efforts.
New Mexico Local Economic Development Act Colfax Economic-development incentive / state program New Mexico communities and qualifying economic-development projects, including Colfax County and several local municipalities.
ROAMS Local Resources Colfax Health and family resource directory Colfax, northeastern New Mexico, family support, prenatal/postnatal services, youth/family resources, and local service referrals.

Downloadable data files are available for users who need a spreadsheet or source list.

Amplifier source index

Calendars, newsletters, directories, and visitor-guide pathways.

ChannelArea servedTypeWhat users can ask
Red River Brewing Company & Distillery Red River / Colfax Own-site newsletter / mailing list Ask about newsletter signup, promotion fit, and any business-originating mailing-list opportunity.
Angel Fire Resort Events Angel Fire / Colfax Events calendar; calendar subscription; newsletter signup Check event fit, calendar options, and newsletter signup path.
Angel Fire Resort Vacation Rentals Angel Fire / Colfax Events referral; newsletter signup Ask whether local events, lodging partners, or visitor resources can be shared.
Red River Chamber / RedRiver.org Events Red River / Colfax Events calendar; submit event; newsletter; vacation guide Submit local visitor-friendly events and ask about guide or newsletter fit.
Red River Chamber Vacation Guide Red River / Colfax Vacation guide request; visitor mailing pathway; newsletter Ask about visitor-guide listing or advertising requirements, deadlines, and eligibility.
Visit Angel Fire NM Get Listed Angel Fire / Colfax Business listing intake; event submission; newsletter signup Submit eligible properties/listings or ask about event/listing pathways.
Visit Angel Fire Events Angel Fire / Colfax Events calendar; list your event; calendar subscription; newsletter Submit local events and prepare clean event data, images, and contact details.
Visit Trinidad Tourism / Resources for Locals Trinidad / Las Animas Marketing support; social media co-op; community calendar; business directory request Ask about event support, attraction/business listings, co-promotion, and community calendar fit.
Visit Trinidad Submit Event Trinidad / Las Animas Event submission rules / approval process Submit events for review with complete public details and images.
City of Trinidad Economic Development Trinidad / Las Animas Economic-development newsletter; business news/resources/events Ask how to receive updates or share business-resource news.
Main Street LIVE Trinidad / Las Animas Events calendar; season lineup; special events Ask about event partnership, venue calendar fit, sponsorship, or audience alignment.
Main Street LIVE 2026 Calendar Trinidad / Las Animas Calendar / ticketed event lineup Check schedule fit and ask about partnership or listing opportunities.
Spanish Peaks Country Newsletter Huerfano County / Walsenburg / La Veta / Cuchara Newsletter; events calendar; submit event; business directory; add listing Ask about event submission, directory listing, newsletter signup, and visitor-guide pathways.
Spanish Peaks Country Business Directory Huerfano County Business directory; add business listing Submit or update eligible business listings.
Spanish Peaks Country Submit Event Huerfano County Submit event; event calendar Submit events with clean title, timing, location, description, contact, and image.
World Journal Huerfano / Walsenburg Newspaper, events, classifieds, advertising inquiry possible Ask about story coverage, event listings, classifieds, legal notices, advertising, and deadlines.
La Veta Creative District La Veta / Huerfano Events/festivals, arts visibility, possible mailing/news Ask about arts events, festival participation, listings, partner sharing, or newsletter options.

Next action

Choose the next practical route.

  • Search public directories and local leads
  • Find event calendars, newsletters, visitor guides, and directory channels
  • Submit a correction with a public source link
  • Open the public contact appendix
Back to top

Immediate directory

Find the right route.

Search by need, county, town, audience, or task. Results include practical links and update reminders so users can act without treating old details as final.

Results update after submitting the form or after a short pause while typing. Press Escape to close this panel.

Open resource directory Submit a correction

Colfax NM + Las Animas CO + Huerfano CO

This guide helps businesses, artists, nonprofits, programs, venues, and service providers find the right regional route faster.

See something outdated? Send a source link through Submit Update so the guide can improve.
